title: Stelis jalapensis
taxonomy: Stelis jalapensis is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Stelis, which is a part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. The subtribe Pleurothallidinae is a member of the tribe Epidendreae, within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae is part of the family Orchidaceae. This classification places Stelis jalapensis within the broader plant kingdom, specifically in the kingdom Plantae.

Its medicinal uses include treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant's extracts have been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. However, more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential and benefits.
